title: Avenger Totem – Sasuke Uchiha
description: This resource pack replaces the Totem of Undying with a pixel-art design inspired by Sasuke Uchiha.
body:
![sasuke](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b1fb2918301bb490d5c6da66f1423d1bacc0cd66.png)
# ⚡ Avenger Totem – Sasuke Uchiha

*(Totem of Undying Texture Pack)*

### ✨ About This Pack

This resource pack replaces the **Totem of Undying** with a **pixel-art design inspired by Sasuke Uchiha**.
Cold, powerful, and iconic, this totem captures Sasuke’s presence while keeping a clean vanilla Minecraft style.

The official download is hosted on **Modrinth**.

---

### 🌀 Other Naruto Totems

More Naruto-inspired totems are available.
Check out **Naruto Uzumaki, Jiraiya, Obito, and Orochimaru** Totem packs.

---

### ⭐ Features

- ✔️ Custom Sasuke Uchiha Totem of Undying
- ✔️ Vanilla Minecraft only
- ✔️ **Minecraft Java 1.8 → 1.21+** support
- ✔️ Multiplayer-safe
- ✔️ Clean anime pixel-art

---

### 📥 Download & Installation

🔗 **Download:** Available via Modrinth

1. Download the pack
2. Place it in `.minecraft/resourcepacks`
3. Enable in Resource Packs

---
